name_en: ❤️LolaTB Plush Wool Blend Tote Bag, crafted from Italian fine-gauge cotton and plush wool blend tweed for durability and a rich atmosphere. Features a signature plaid pattern with quilting and padding for a soft, pillow-like feel. Front Thomas logo, sleek modern silhouette, and adjustable gold chain strap for shoulder or crossbody wear. Hidden magnetic closure, card slot, and lightweight design. Stylish and versatile.
